messages.text: Stretching for 5 mins, then back to math!
Working on a new Next.js dashboard

tickets.subject: Distraction shield not blocking Chrome extensions
tickets.message: I notice my extension is still letting youtube pages load even when focus lock is active.

replies.text: Hello! Please make sure you have granted file access permissions to the Study Shield extension.
